items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not sufficiently support the validation of the persona scenario 'Group booking with attendee list'. While there are descriptions of the booking process and feedback collection, there is no clear indication that the specific scenario behavior has been tested or confirmed. The lack of concrete evidence regarding the expected outcome leaves the validation inconclusive.
